PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-05-2022 Continued To Sep-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Millar, for Maria Garcia, Petitioner.

The court and counsel discuss the type of order that he is looking for to provide Charles Schwab. Counsel suggests the order be modified to a global order to include any, and all IRA accounts in the name of the decedent. The court reminds counsel that its power is limited to only what is requested within the petition. The court and counsel continue to discuss his options to have the IRA funds released to the petitioner. The court suggests that counsel consider opening an estate matter and to file an 850 petition or, a spousal property petition as to the IRA.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Sep-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Prado. Not Reported.
